adds.rationale: Adds dedicated robotics exposure to a watchlist whose only robotics name is medical-only (ISRG); NVIDIA's GR00T humanoid-foundation-model launch at GTC (Mar 18, 2024) is a credible buildup-phase catalyst for the broader humanoid/industrial robotics wave the profile names explicitly.

news_evidence.summary: NVIDIA announces Project GR00T, a general-purpose foundation model for humanoid robots, plus Jetson Thor SoC and Isaac platform upgrades, partnering with 1X, Agility, Apptronik, Boston Dynamics, Figure AI, Sanctuary, Unitree, XPENG.

ROBO Global Q1-2024 commentary: NVIDIA (11.8% of index weight in robotics benchmarks) cited as compressing humanoid-robot development timelines from years to months via Isaac/GR00T; Jensen Huang flags robotics and physical automation as a top opportunity at GTC.

IEEE Spectrum technical writeup: GR00T positions NVIDIA as the de-facto compute and simulation supplier for humanoid robotics, broadening industry funding flows beyond pure-play robot companies into the diversified ETF basket.

removes.rationale: Pairs the BOTZ add to keep |watchlist|=8; thesis breach signal — Gemini image-generation rollout was paused mid-quarter after a public backlash, ~$70-96B of market cap was shed in days, and Alphabet now visibly trails MSFT/OpenAI on consumer-AI execution while MSFT and NVDA remain in the watchlist to carry the AI buildup wave.

news_evidence.summary: Google pauses Gemini's image-generation of people after historically inaccurate outputs, the rollout is publicly walked back by Pichai as 'unacceptable.'
Alphabet shares fall ~4.4% to $137.57; the dip equates to ~$70B of market-cap erased and ~$96.9B as of Feb 26 on Gemini fallout.
Co-founder Sergey Brin publicly concedes 'we definitely messed up on the image generation,' signaling internal-execution issues at the AI lab through Q1.

rationale_overall: Cap-8 watchlist is full, so this is a single-pair swap: rotate from the AI laggard (GOOGL, fresh Gemini thesis breach) into a dedicated robotics ETF (BOTZ) catalyzed by NVIDIA's GR00T humanoid-foundation-model launch at GTC. Net effect: AI exposure narrows to the two cleanest names (MSFT, NVDA), and the profile's named 'robotics' next wave finally has a non-medical expression alongside ISRG. Nuclear (URA), geopolitical-energy (XLE), demographics/pharma (LLY), rockets/spacecraft (ARKX) unchanged.
